task: I need to leave a short note for the front desk about a room that still needs attention after a busy shift. Can you help me put the details in a clear order so it’s easy to pass along?

turns.agent_response:
Yes — send me the room details, and I’ll put them into a short front desk note in a clear order.

I can make sure it includes:
- room number
- what still needs attention
- what’s already been done
- who was told
- anything urgent or time-sensitive

If you want, I can keep it plain and quick to read.

user_simulator.text:
Yeah. Here’s the kind of thing I’d leave:

Room 214 still needs attention. Bathroom towels and trash were not replaced, and there’s a wet spot by the sink that needs to be checked. Bed is made, but the coffee supplies were not restocked. I already reported it to housekeeping and told the front desk at 3:20. Please have maintenance look at the sink leak before the next check-in.

Something like that — short, clear, in order.

turns.agent_response:
Got it — here’s a clean version in that order:

**Room 214 still needs attention. Bathroom towels and trash were not replaced, and there is a wet spot by the sink that needs to be checked. Bed is made, but coffee supplies were not restocked. I reported it to housekeeping and told the front desk at 3:20. Please have maintenance check the sink leak before the next check-in.**

If you want, I can also make it even shorter, like a quick handoff line.

user_simulator.text: Yeah, that works. Clean and in the right order. Short enough for the front desk to read quick.
